DESCRIPTION: The DJI Mavic 3 Pro is a flagship consumer drone featuring a triple-camera system with a 4/3 CMOS Hasselblad main camera, a 1/2-inch medium tele camera, and a 1/2-inch tele camera. With up to 43 minutes of flight time, omnidirectional obstacle sensing, and a 15km transmission range via O3+ technology, it is the ultimate aerial photography tool for professionals and enthusiasts alike.

The DJI Mini 4 Pro weighs under 249g, making it regulation-friendly in many countries. It boasts a 1/1.3-inch CMOS sensor capable of 4K/60fps video, omnidirectional obstacle sensing, and up to 34 minutes of flight time. Its vertical shooting mode is ideal for social media content creators seeking a powerful yet compact aerial platform.

The DJI Matrice 350 RTK is an enterprise-grade drone built for demanding commercial applications including surveying, mapping, and inspection. It supports a triple-payload system, offers up to 55 minutes of flight time, IP55 weather resistance, and integrates real-time kinematic positioning for centimetre-level accuracy. Compatible with DJIs full suite of enterprise payloads.

The DJI Avata 2 is an immersive FPV cinewhoop drone designed for high-speed, low-altitude flight and cinematic footage. Featuring a 1/1.3-inch sensor shooting 4K/60fps, it pairs with the DJI Goggles 3 for an intuitive first-person flight experience. Its durable propeller guard design allows confident flight in tight indoor and outdoor spaces.

The DJI Agras T50 is a heavy-duty agricultural drone capable of carrying a 50kg spray payload or 70kg spreading payload. Equipped with an active phased array radar and binocular vision system for precise terrain following, it delivers efficient large-scale crop treatment. Its coaxial twin-rotor design provides exceptional stability and spraying coverage for modern precision agriculture.

The DJI Neo 2 is an ultra-lightweight (151g), beginner-friendly self-flying camera drone. Designed for solo creators, it features palm takeoff/landing, gesture control, omnidirectional obstacle sensing, and 4K/60fps video. It boasts automated shots, ActiveTrack, and full-coverage propeller guards for ultimate flight safety

The Autel Alpha is an enterprise-grade, multi-purpose industrial drone designed for professionals in public safety, search and rescue, and energy infrastructure inspection. It features a robust, foldable, IP55-rated weather-resistant airframe and an advanced 5-in-1 gimbal payload.

The Autel EVO Max 4N is an advanced, enterprise-grade commercial drone engineered specifically for night-time operations, tactical reconnaissance, and complex industrial inspections. It pairs a heavy-lift airframe with a powerful FusionLight quad-sensor payload that includes a super-starlight night vision camera.

The Autel Robotics EVO Max 4T-XE is an advanced commercial-grade enterprise drone built with an industry-first multi-sensor camera, autonomous flight, A-Mesh networking, and 720° obstacle avoidance. Engineered for public safety, search and rescue, and industrial inspections, it handles highly complex and GPS-denied environments.

The Autel Robotics EVO II Pro Rugged Bundle is a commercial-grade, foldable drone package built for demanding workflows and professional videography. Flight Performance: Provides up to 40 minutes of flight time, wind resistance up to Level 8 (27 mph), and a top speed of 45 mph in Ludicrous mode.

The Autel EVO Lite 640T Enterprise is a lightweight, portable commercial drone designed for public safety, search and rescue, and industrial inspections. Weighing only 866 grams, it features a dual-camera system with a 640x512 thermal sensor and a 48MP visible-light camera, alongside AI target recognition and a 12km (7.4-mile) transmission range.

The NewBeeDrone AcroBee75 HD O4 Pusher is a 75mm micro FPV drone that integrates the high-definition DJI O4 video system into a lightweight tiny whoop format. Its inverted pusher design significantly improves aerodynamic efficiency and lowers the center of gravity, delivering remarkably smooth, jello-free HD footage and precise flight control

The NewBeeDrone AcroBee65 Brushed V2 ELRS BNF is a 65mm micro FPV tiny whoop designed for beginner-friendly indoor and tight-space flying. It features an integrated F411 flight controller, an SPI ExpressLRS receiver, active motor braking, and a SmartMAX VTX that pushes up to 400mW for excellent range

The NewBeeDrone VRDrone V2.5 BNF (Bind-N-Fly) is an ultra-lightweight, 1S brushed micro FPV whoop. Designed as a docile and highly durable learning platform, it is perfect for beginners. The BNF version requires your own BeeMote V2 radio controller, or it can be purchased in a complete Ready-To-Fly (RTF) bundle.

The NewBeeDrone AcroBee75 BLV5 Ultimate Outdoor Whoop is a 75mm 2S brushless micro FPV drone. Weighing just 36.4 grams, it is built around the 5th generation BeeBrain FC. Designed primarily for outdoor freestyle and racing, it pairs high agility with impressive power and extended flight times

The NewBeeDrone Hummingbird V3.1 Brushless is a highly agile 65mm 1S FPV tiny whoop. It features a unique X-shaped all-in-one flight controller with integrated ELRS, completely solderless plug-and-play components, and comes in two distinct variants tailored for everyday flying or competitive racing.
